title: lepidium sativum
intro: Lepidium sativum, also known as garden cress, is a fast-growing annual plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lepidium sativum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and provide antioxidant properties. Lepidium sativum can be consumed as a fresh herb, added to salads or sandwiches, or prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and seeds in hot water.
